message.content: 深度分析模块 android（路径: android/）。识别关键文件、类、函数，理解模块职责和对外接口。返回详细的模块分析。描述: Android ART 运行时镜像

attachment.content:
- coredump: Analyze an Android coredump file. Print a Java class and its members, or drill into any field by address.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies
- superpowers:executing-plans: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
- superpowers:receiving-code-review
- superpowers:requesting-code-review
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- superpowers:systematic-debugging
- superpowers:test-driven-development
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees
- superpowers:using-superpowers
- superpowers:verification-before-completion
- superpowers:writing-plans
- superpowers:writing-skills

- claude-mem:design-is
- claude-mem:do
- claude-mem:how-it-works

- understand-anything:understand
- understand-anything:understand-chat
- understand-anything:understand-dashboard
- understand-anything:understand-diff
- understand-anything:understand-domain
- understand-anything:understand-explain
- understand-anything:understand-knowledge
- understand-anything:understand-onboard
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review

18	#define ANDROID_JDK_JAVA_LANG_STRING_H_
19	
20	#include "java/lang/Object.h"
21	
22	namespace java {
23	namespace lang {
24	
25	class String : public Object {
26	public:
27	    String(uint32_t obj) : Object(obj) {}
28	    String(Object& obj) : Object(obj) {}
29	    String(art::mirror::Object& obj) : Object(obj) {}
30	
31	    std::string toString();
32	    static void FormatDump(const char* prefix, art::mirror::Object& obj);
33	};
34	
35	} // namespace lang
36	} // namespace java
37	
38	#endif // ANDROID_JDK_JAVA_LANG_STRING_H_
39

input.purpose: Android ART 运行时镜像模块，用于在 coredump 分析中完整镜像 AOSP ART (Android Runtime) 的内存布局和数据结构，实现对 Android 进程内部状态的深度解析
responsibilities: 镜像 ART Runtime 核心数据结构（Runtime、Heap、Thread、ClassLinker 等）
提供 Java 对象模型访问（Object、Class、String、Array）
支持跨 Android SDK 版本的内存布局适配（SDK 23-37，对应 Android 6.0-Android 15）
解析 DEX 文件格式（Standard DEX、Compact DEX）
处理 OAT/VDEX 文件和 JIT 编译代码
遍历 Java 堆内存（Image Space、Zygote Space、Region Space 等）
解析 Java 方法和字段元数据（ArtMethod、ArtField）
提供 JNI 引用表访问（Local/Global/Weak Global References）
读取 Android 系统属性（Property System）
提供高级 Java 对象遍历接口（ForeachObjects、ForeachReferences）
支持符号路径映射（SysRoot）用于离线 DEX/VDEX 文件关联

key_classes.name: Android
key_classes.description: 模块主入口类，管理 Android 环境信息、SDK 版本检测、Runtime 实例访问

key_classes.name: art::Runtime
key_classes.description: ART 运行时核心类，提供 Heap、ThreadList、ClassLinker、JavaVM 等子系统访问

key_classes.name: art::mirror::Object
key_classes.description: Java 对象基类镜像，所有 Java 对象的内存布局基础

key_classes.name: art::mirror::Class
key_classes.description: Java 类对象镜像，包含类元数据、方法表、字段表、虚表等

key_classes.name: art::ArtMethod
key_classes.description: Java 方法元数据，包含访问修饰符、DEX 索引、入口点地址等

key_classes.name: art::ArtField
key_classes.description: Java 字段元数据，包含类型、偏移量、访问修饰符等

key_classes.name: art::gc::Heap
key_classes.description: GC 堆管理器，维护所有内存空间（Continuous/Discontinuous Spaces）

key_classes.name: art::gc::space::Space
key_classes.description: 内存空间基类，支持 ImageSpace、ZygoteSpace、RegionSpace、LargeObjectSpace 等

key_classes.name: art::Thread
key_classes.description: Java 线程镜像，包含线程状态、栈信息、JNI 环境等

key_classes.name: art::DexFile
key_classes.description: DEX 文件解析器，提供类型、方法、字段、字符串等查询接口

key_classes.name: Android::ForeachObjects
key_classes.description: 遍历所有 Java 堆对象的高级接口，支持按空间类型过滤

key_classes.name: Android::ForeachReferences
key_classes.description: 遍历 JNI 引用表（Local/Global/WeakGlobal）的高级接口

interfaces.name: Android::Init()
interfaces.description: 初始化 Android 模块，检测 SDK 版本和系统属性

interfaces.name: Android::Sdk()
interfaces.description: 获取当前 Android SDK 版本号（23-37）

interfaces.name: Android::GetRuntime()
interfaces.description: 获取 ART Runtime 实例

interfaces.name: Android::ForeachObjects(fn, flag, check)
interfaces.description: 遍历 Java 堆对象，支持过滤 Image/Zygote/App/Fake 空间

interfaces.name: Android::ForeachReferences(fn, flag)
interfaces.description: 遍历 JNI 引用表，支持过滤 Local/Global/WeakGlobal 引用

interfaces.name: Android::ForeachArtMethods(clazz, fn)
interfaces.description: 遍历类的所有方法（包括直接方法和虚方法）

interfaces.name: Android::SysRoot(path)
interfaces.description: 设置符号根目录，用于离线关联 DEX/VDEX 文件

interfaces.name: art::Runtime::Current()
interfaces.description: 获取当前 Runtime 单例

interfaces.name: art::Runtime::GetHeap()
interfaces.description: 获取 GC 堆管理器

interfaces.name: art::gc::Heap::GetContinuousSpaces()
interfaces.description: 获取连续内存空间列表

interfaces.name: art::gc::Heap::GetDiscontinuousSpaces()
interfaces.description: 获取非连续内存空间列表（Large Object Space）

interfaces.name: art::mirror::Class::GetDexFile()
interfaces.description: 获取类所在的 DEX 文件

interfaces.name: art::DexFile::StringDataByIdx(idx)
interfaces.description: 根据索引获取 DEX 字符串

dependencies: api (MemoryRef 内存引用基础设施)

content.text:
已完成对 `android/` 模块的深度分析。该模块是 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 的核心组件，实现了对 AOSP ART (Android Runtime) 运行时环境的完整镜像，使工具能够解析 Android coredump 中的 Java 层状态。

模块核心价值在于：

1. **跨版本兼容**：支持 Android 6.0 到 Android 15（SDK 23-37），通过动态 offset 表适配不同版本的内存布局变化

2. **完整的 ART 镜像**：镜像了 Runtime、Heap、Thread、ClassLinker、JIT、GC 等所有关键子系统

3. **DEX/OAT 解析能力**：支持 Standard DEX、Compact DEX、OAT、VDEX 等所有 Android 可执行格式

4. **高级遍历接口**：提供 `ForeachObjects`（堆对象遍历）和 `ForeachReferences`（JNI 引用遍历）等高层 API，简化上层命令开发

5. **类型安全的内存访问**：所有 ART 数据结构都继承自 `api::MemoryRef`，提供类型安全的跨进程内存访问

模块架构清晰，分为 `art/runtime`（运行时核心）、`art/dex`（DEX 解析）、`art/runtime/gc`（GC 系统）、`jdk`（Java 标准库）、`properties`（系统属性）等子模块，与 AOSP 源码结构保持一致。
